# Burlington 2009, the raise — 750 Wright voters rank Kiss first, and Kiss loses

*Generated from [`burlington_2009_raise_kiss_nonmono.yaml`](../burlington_2009_raise_kiss_nonmono.yaml) — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: `python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/tools_adam/scripts/build_yaml_pages.py`.*

**Method:** [RCV-IRV (Instant Runoff)](../../../00_start_here/RCV_IRV) · **1 seat** · **Expected winner:** Montroll

## Scenario

Non-monotonicity on the real profile. Take the real ballots and let 750
Wright-first voters RAISE the actual winner Kiss to the top of their
ballots (all 281 who already ranked Kiss second — their top two swap —
plus 469 of the 840 Wright-only bullet voters, who become Kiss>Wright;
chosen so the Montroll-vs-Kiss margin itself moves against Montroll by
only 469, less than his 587-vote head-to-head cushion). Kiss gains 750
first-choice votes and LOSES: Wright now falls in the semifinal (2543 vs
Montroll's 2553), Montroll survives to the final and wins it 4063-3945.
Raising a candidate made him lose — the additional-support paradox, built
from real ballots. The mirror no-show reading: roughly the same bloc
staying home also elects Montroll. Lesson page: README.md in this folder.
Real ballots: PrefLib dataset 00005 (00005-00000002.toi, 8,980 ballots,
384 unique orders; from Burlington's published election records). 6
ballots (0.07%) carrying equal-rank overvotes are not representable in
this ranked syntax and are excluded — 8,974 tabulated; every official
figure reproduces within +/-1 and every margin is hundreds of votes.

## What the engine says

Full report from the [`_tabulated` mirror](../burlington_2009_tabulated/burlington_2009_raise_kiss_nonmono_tabulated.txt) (regenerated on every run; every analysis forced on):

```text
--- RCV / Instant-Runoff Voting (single winner) ---
  Burlington 2009, the raise — 750 Wright voters rank Kiss first, and Kiss loses
 Tabulating 8974 ballots (ranked ballots).

ROUND 1
Candidate      Votes  Status
-----------  -------  --------
Kiss            3335  Hopeful
Wright          2200  Hopeful
Montroll        2062  Hopeful
Smith           1306  Rejected
WriteIn           36  Rejected
Simpson           35  Rejected

ROUND 2
Candidate      Votes  Status
-----------  -------  --------
Kiss            3731  Hopeful
Montroll        2553  Hopeful
Wright          2543  Rejected
Smith              0  Rejected
WriteIn            0  Rejected
Simpson            0  Rejected
Blank Votes      147  Rejected

FINAL RESULT
Candidate      Votes  Status
-----------  -------  --------
Montroll        4063  Elected
Kiss            3945  Rejected
Wright             0  Rejected
Smith              0  Rejected
WriteIn            0  Rejected
Simpson            0  Rejected
Blank Votes      966  Rejected


Winner(s) — RCV / Instant-Runoff Voting (single winner)
  Montroll
```

Run it yourself:

```bash
python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/starvote_larry_hastings.py method_comparisons/burlington_2009/burlington_2009_raise_kiss_nonmono.yaml
```
